name: root
description: Automatically generated package.json, please edit manually

scripts.test: npx nx run-many -t test --parallel=8 && npm run format:check
scripts.test:ci: npm run lint && npm run build --force && npm run test
scripts.clean: npx nx run-many -t clean && npm run clean:build && rm -rf node_modules
scripts.clean:build: npx nx run-many --target=clean --all 2>/dev/null; for dir in packages/*/dist; do [ -d "$dir" ] && rm -rf "$dir"; done; find packages -name '*.tsbuildinfo' -maxdepth 2 -delete 2>/dev/null; true
scripts.build: tsc -b packages/integration-sdk-entity-validator packages/integration-sdk-core packages/integration-sdk-runtime packages/integration-sdk-private-test-utils packages/integration-sdk-cli packages/integration-sdk-testing packages/integration-sdk-http-client packages/integration-sdk-entities
scripts.prepush: npm run lint && npm run build:dist && npm run test:changed
